user_query: I'm planning a road trip with my friends to explore the Thai countryside. Can you fetch the round dates for the Thai Lottery during the trip period? Furthermore, I want to know the latest lottery result to check if we hit the jackpot. Additionally, I need some interesting trivia questions about Thailand to keep the journey entertaining.

TaskList.description: Fetch the round dates for the Thai Lottery during the specified trip period.
Fetch the latest lottery result to check if we hit the jackpot.
Gather interesting trivia questions about Thailand for entertainment during the trip.
